bundle.shortDescription: Professional course presentation and PPT editing tool
bundle.longDescription: Lecture Presenter - 专业的课程演示与PPT编辑工具。A Tauri 2 desktop application for browsing course materials including slides, videos, readings, and assignments, with built-in PPT-EXTRA slide editing capabilities.
